news.title: Persona 4 Revival launches into an already-stacked February 2027, will be on Xbox Game Pass on Day One
news.titleEN: Persona 4 Revival launches into an already-stacked February 2027, will be on Xbox Game Pass on Day One
news.desc:
It's been a while, but we've finally learned more about Persona 4 Revival during today's Xbox livestream. Per a new trailer from Atlus, Persona 4 Revival launches on 18th February on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, and PC.
